Title: Claim and schedule interaction model
Status: Done
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
Ticket: CMP-FE-511
Epic: CMP-E5: Claiming, Scheduling, and Posting Execution
---

As a contributor
I want a fast claim flow with default date/channel so I can commit quickly.
So friction to participation stays low.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Claim CTA appears only on unclaimed items.
- [ ] Default channel is LinkedIn unless intended channel is set.
- [ ] Default scheduled date is user-local today.
- [ ] Success path offers ICS action immediately.
- [ ] Conflict errors refresh card/detail state instantly.
